entry.title: Manage Mass Maintenance for custom fields in product master
entry.content:
Does the app Manage Mass Maintenance for Products cover custom fields in product master?

We have added custom fields in the product master on plant level. We would like to understand if all these will be possible to mass update in the app Manage Mass Maintenance for Product Master.

We are using SAP Public Cloud.

entry.title: Re: ECC to S4 HANA Greenfield implementation
entry.content:
Hi @VPS 

To ensure the correct tag is used to help find the right experts, could you let me know if you are talking about SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud or an On-Premise solution?

Kind Regards,
Stephen

entry.title: SAP Build Apps Import Error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am learning from https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/build-apps-cap-app.html tutorial.

I am getting error while importing RiskManagement.mtar file to https://ABCDEtrial.us10.build.cloud.sap/lobby  (My SAP BTP Trial account).

I can upload RiskManagement.gpg file to lobby provided in above tutorial without any errors.

How can I identify error in my BAS code.

Application is developed in BAS tool and able to fetch data from 

"curl https://RiskManagement-RiskManagementService.dest/Risks" command. 

 

 

 

Thank you in Advance.

Prasanna

entry.title: Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token (JWT) has been provided. This is strictly neces
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to call sap odata service from a cap application uisnng cds spawn job.Using  destination with PrincipalPropagation, But geeting error.

 

 

my code :- 

cds.spawn({ 
          user: cds.context?.user,
          tenant: cds.context?.tenant,
          headers: cds.context?.headers || req?.headers,
          after: iafterTime }, async (req) => {
         sendToSAP(req, customID)
})

const sendToSAP = async (req, customID) => {   
    const payload = {}  
    const oSAPService = await cds.connect.to("sap_destination")
    let headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    headers.authorization = cds.context?.headers || req?.headers
      const response = await oSAPService.send({
        method: "POST",
        path: "/xxxx/xxxxxx_SRV/dummyEntitySet",
        data: payload,
        headers: headers
      });
}

 

logs:-


[cds] - connect to sap_odata > odata-v2 { destination: 'sap_destination', forwardAuthToken: true }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR [remote] - Error: Error during request to remote service:
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR Failed to load destination.
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at run (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/utils/client.js:310:31)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async RemoteService.<anonymous> (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:276:20)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async next (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:76:17)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async RemoteService.handle (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:74:10)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async Object.methodName(/home/vcap/app/srv/util/myfile.js:102:24)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async mycatfile (/home/vcap/app/srv/util/mycatfile.js:524:22) {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR statusCode: 502,
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR reason: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR message: 'Error during request to remote service: \n' +
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR "Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token (JWT) has been provided. This is strictly necessary for 'PrincipalPropagation'.",
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR request: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR method: 'POST',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR url: '/xxxx/xxxxxx_SRV/dummyEntitySet',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR headers: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR accept: 'application/json,text/plain',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'accept-language': 'en',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'content-type': 'application/json',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'content-length': 311,
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR authorization: 'Bearer ...'
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR },
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR correlationId: '507a3d4f-bf6d-4296-4cc1-f6b8f070ee2b'
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR }


dependencies :- 

"node": "^18.0.0"
"@sap/cds": "6.8.4"

entry.title: Re: List of users authorized for reports in SAC
entry.content: Even though I didn't find exactly what I was looking for, I found something that would work. After going to System -> Overview, I went to the Authorization tab, selected the user I wanted from the user list and clicked on the Fact Sheet on the right. Information about the user I selected is opened. After selecting the Security tab, I selected the Stories tab below and found the reports authorized by the user I selected. Thanks again

Kind Regards,
Stephen

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/319008

Volker

entry.title: BTP, ABAP Edition and use of flat files
entry.content:
Dear community,

Is the usage of flat files/CSV files still supported with BTP, ABAP Edition?

E.g. is it still possible to upload files to a storage reachable by ABAP jobs running in the BTP, use the respective ABAP statements to read and process the files? (And also write to files and make them available to a location outside BTP)

Thank you for your help.

 

Felix

entry.title: How to remove SMIN from create defect in Focused Build
entry.content:
In Focused Build, when creating a Defect from a test execution, user gets the option to create Defect Type SMIN and S1DM.

As we are not using SAP ITSM we want to remove SMIN from the list, but I'm not sure where to do this.

Kind Regards Torben

entry.title: Re: Deploy database with CAPM to PostgreSQL instance with...
entry.content: Hello, no I have not found a solution. However I got a response from support saying: we currently do not support multiple database containers within the same physical instances, because Postgres can not ensure resource isolation between the different database containers. So I dont think there can be done anything about it. Hope it helps.

entry.title: JIRA integration with Solution Manager 7.2
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are looking to integrate SAP CHARM 7.2 version with JIRA. 

Can you please share any documentation and KBA for the same, which covers information about add-on installation on JIRA and Solution Manager ?

Thanks


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: JIRA integration with Solution Manager 7.2
entry.content:
Dear Customer

Please let me explain that such integration is available with Focused Build (ST-OST) and not with ChaRM. Regarding areas of integration for External Tool Integration in Focused Build I can suggest that you refer to page Focused Build for SAP Solution Manager here under Product Capabilities you will find document External Tool Integration

Also in SAP Help Portal link Focused Build and Focused Insights for SAP Solution Manager

in Integration section you will find the corresponding API documents 

External Requirement API

How to integrate external requirement tools in Focused Build

External Tool Integration API

How to integrate external software development tools in Focused Build

In the document External Tool Integration API mentioned before you can see that the areas for external integration are :

Requirement Inbound =>

    • Create and update Requirements from external tool
    • Synchronize status updates

Development Outsourcing => 

    • Handle development tasks in external tool
    • Focused Build needs to be the leading system for the creation of the tasks

CI/CD Integration

    • Document external DevOps operations
    • Perform status changes of Work Items

Scrum Board

    • UI5 Scrum Board running on top of Focused Build
    • No data replication like in the Development Outsourcing scenario

Thanks and best regards

entry.title: Re: WEBi Export broken with 4.3 SP4 PL200 and PL400?
entry.content: Hi, I got the some problem. Only users in an administrator group can export reports. Please, tell us if you find a solution to the problem

entry.title: Interface between MDM and SAP ECC
entry.content:
Hi all,

I need to create an interface between MDM system and SAP ECC for Business Partner.

In the detail MDM will pass the general data of a Business Partner and in SAP I need to create a BP with the general data filled though the data sent by MDM system.

Anyone with experience with this interface? Any idea on how can I configure this on SAP?

Thanks

entry.title: How to receive Material from Supplier under Warranty on Returnable Basis without Purchase Order
entry.content:
We need to get Material from Supplier on Replacement Basis against Warranty. Which movement type can be used for this? We need to take the material in stock but at the same time we need not to pay to Supplier but we want to send Defective Material against this supply.

Will you guide us how can we get Warranty material first in stock and later return the defective Material.

Ramu

entry.title: Re: Addons are removed automatically after restart the server

Kindly confirm the SAP Business One version and patch where the issue is reproducible.

Also, are those the Lightweight add-ons or the normal add-ons?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Production staging with intermediate storage bins
entry.content:
Hi,

we use advanced production integration based on PMRs in EWM 9.40.

In one of our warehouses a third party system is installed on a production line. Here we would like to implement the following process.

1) A production order will be released and a PMR will be created in EWM. 

2) E.g. 1 or 2 hours before the planned production start, warehouse tasks for staging are created (e.g. by /SCWM/STAGE) to transfer all required components to an intermediate bin in a pallet storage that is inside the production supply area. The destination bin should be proposed by EWM (= empty bin) or it will be confirmed manually by the forklift driver. 

3)  Some time later the production line will be set up for the production order. This is the trigger for the third party system on the production line to send a first warehouse request to EWM to transfer specified components from the intermediate pallet storage to specified storage bins on the production line. 
In the running production the third party system has to create further warehouse requests if e.g. the available quantity of a component falls below a defined value.  

4) The consumption for the components is posted by the third party system during production with function module /SCWM/MFG_CONSUME_ITEMS_EXT. The storage bin on the production line (see step 3) is specified as the goods movement bin for the consumption postings.

 

The steps 1 and 4 are no problem. But I don´t know how to set up the steps 2 and 3.

Is this process possible in EWM 9.40 in standard?  

Thank you for any advice.

Best regards, Julian

entry.title: Re: Why does an asset depreciation interval insert (via B...
entry.content:
Thank you @GavinMonteiro3. The work around you suggest is easy enough to do.
Was just hoping to know why the BAPI returns an error but the front-end returns a warning.

I need to implement a bulk programmatic/ABAP solution.

entry.title: Re: Send mail service not working
entry.content:
@naveenvishal 

The OData URL should be : http://localhost:4004/odata/v4/mail/sendmail

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner
entry.content:
Mitch... Hi! Welcome to the community. You should consider exploring the SAP Community Supply Chain Management group. Also, your post reminded me of the SAP Innovation Awards 2023, where I provided entry support for 2 stories that will provide customer examples around PM and MM... 

  • [Winner] The Critical Importance of Intelligent Asset Management and Maintenance Reliability
    Petrobras works with mission critical industrial equipment to run operations at the Buzios field representing the world's largest deep-water reservoir. Any incidents can impact workers safety, reliability, operational efficiencies, or environmental requirements. With SAP Intelligent Asset Management (IAM) including SAP Asset Strategy and Performance Management (ASPM) and SAP Predictive Asset Insights (PAI) the team is now in a better position to pro-actively mitigate risks, and potential failures, by enabling proactive scheduled preventive maintenance strategies with increased availability.

  • Use of SAP Fiori to optimize initial assembly, changing and rotating tires
    Celulose Nipo-Brasileira S.A. (CENIBRA) needed to create a fleet management control process for tires using 100% of the standard functionalities of SAP PM (Plant Maintenance) in an interactive, dynamic, fast way and with a simple and intuitive user interface. The SAP solution, which includes SAP S/4HANA integration for procurement and financials, enables managing tires more efficiently, monitoring restorations, and interactive changing tires features. Today CENIBRA can collect information more accurately for proactive planning, preventative maintenance, scheduled repairs, new orders, and budget management.

Also, keep an eye out for SAP Business AI capabilities, which will transform this area!

All the best!

entry.title: Re: Creating roles in production
entry.content: Roles are customizing and must only be created and maintained in your Development system and then be transported to your Production system. By doing this you ensure having consistent role setup through your landscape and can rest assured that the roles in your Production system are identical with the roles in your Test system.

entry.title: Re: Comp mime type 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' instead ''
entry.content:
The screenshot is too small, I don't see.

Here is mine:

entry.title: False responsibilities in Signavio Process Manager RACI matrix report
entry.content:
Hey there,

I'm stuck with the RACI report from SAP Signavio Process Manager.

I created a quite complex process flow and wanted to generate a RACI matrix from it. I used Signavio's reporting feature, and I experienced that some responsibilities were mixed up. In the matrix, they are not under the relevant role, although they are in the correct swim lane on the drawing. 

Could you give me any suggestions what should I do to have the right RACI report? 
(I tried to save again the process flow, closed it, and opened it again, but I don't have any more idea what to do...)

Thanks in advance for you all!
All the best,
István

entry.title: SAP BW: Automatic sending of server files (al11) to a shared Windows directory
entry.content:
Hi Guys!,

I have created a data model whose data source is a query that is loaded into an open hub which generates a .csv output file in a directory on the al11 transaction server.
And I would need to send this file to another server to deposit it in a Windows directory.
Do you know how I could configure the sending of the file in BW?

BR,

entry.title: Re: Error during Table Data Import in SAP HANA Cloud Data...
entry.content:
Hi Dan_vL ,

Data is small and less than 100 entries/rows. As I mentioned, error is not coming always but it's intermittent. So at the time of error, during import its taking 2-3 minutes and its get failed (as per above error image).

Whenever error is coming, it will last for 30-60 mins (i.e. any new attempt to do data import gets failed with same error) and after 30-60 mins, import will work fine with the same excel data. Also during this time, INSERT SQL statement is not working in SQL Console. And now we are facing this issue frequently, so this data importing is becoming a difficult task.

Also we are not using Data Lake / Azure / AWS, so we are dependent on the regular table Import in Database Explorer.

In the answer you mentioned to "open an issue with technical support" -- Please guide from where I can raise the same?

Please suggest any other solution.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SAP NWBPM calling parameterized mapping from ESR
entry.content: I just found in an article (Using Operation Mappings (PI) in a BPM Process) on help.sap.com that we cannot use value mappings and parameterized mappings in BPM 😞

entry.content:
Hi to the community,

I would like some help with SAP Analytics Cloud.
Is it possible to:
 - rename the "Totals" cell?
 - hide the total of the "Tonnes" column - value 335.000.

Thanks in advance.

 

Regards,

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud – Monitoring All Model Import/Export Jobs
entry.content:
Hi All,

Do you have same issues with no logs for measure-based models (Import connection jobs) in DM Job Statistics and Analysis (Overview)? No logs in system? Via note: 3375756 - Unable to track import jobs for Measure Based Model in Data Management Jobs Statistics and Analysis in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) & SAP Digital Boardroom - SAP for Me 

 

Thanks for reply.

 

Your sincerely,

 

Martin

entry.title: Re: Restrict to close Production Order If Issue & Receipt...
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the issue over here are you facing. Since I don't have system right now, I can't execute and check

entry.title: Structured Material with decentralized EWM
entry.content:
We have decentralized EWM and have some structured materials (in our case: Displays). It's not possible to do the explosion manually in S/4 (error L9526) or during Goods Receipt (error VL583). After some research I come to the conclusion that a "normal" explosion is simply not supported.

My question is: what would be the advised work-around?

I've tried some options in both S/4 and EWM and it seems to me that the only option would be to manually issue the Display and receive its components with, for instance, movement types 502 and 501. Does anyone have a better suggestion?

entry.title: Re: Send mail service not working
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

Thank you for the answer. I have updated and now it shows this:

Connection is being rejected. The service isn’t running on the server, or incorrect proxy settings in vscode, or a firewall is blocking requests. Details: RequestError: connect ECONNREFUSED 127.0.0.1:4004.

entry.title: Re: Feature Request: Allow descriptions for global Proces...
entry.content:
Hi @chemmerich ,

we found that especially unexperienced users struggle with case attributes or the naming of activities and how this relates to their actual process. For advanced filters we are able to define a short filter name within Signavio (which is great, except that it needs to be very short, as it is being cut-off), but for filters that are based on activities they are only displayed as "Activities - 1 activity excluded". We would like to give a little bit more context WHAT (in regards to the process) is excluded and WHY this is default setting.

Your suggestion with with text box makes sense (actually, we are doing it already), but our users still require a lot of repeated explanation and have come up with the question if we as developers of the dashboard could add some tooltips.

BR, Anna

entry.title: Re: Time Off Recruit Rule: Rounding up in 0.5s
entry.content: Hi Evangelia, I will definitely follow that up thank you for your support.

Rest API is configured and ready under "SAP Build Apps classic data entities" and status on the test answers "OK"

entry.title: Re: Restrict to close Production Order If Issue & Receipt...
entry.content:
Hi,

Just a bracket issue. Check with this.

SELECT T0.[DocNum]

FROM OWOR T0 INNER JOIN WOR1 T1 ON T0.[DocEntry] = T1.[DocEntry]
WHERE (T0.[CmpltQty] =0
or T1.[PlannedQty] > T1.[IssuedQty])
and T0.[Status] = 'L' and T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del)

entry.title: Re: Optimizing Tactical Sourcing: Maximizing Benefits from this Guided Buying Channel
entry.content: Very good summary Jorge.... Thanks

entry.title: Re: Customer with multiple distribution channels
entry.content: Select all customer numbers for which entry for distribution channel '03' exists and remove all entries for these customers from your internal table holding the KNVV records selected for 02, 07 and 10..

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Approval
entry.content:
Hi,

Although the document total is custom generated, you must be saving it somewhere. check if query based approval works for you then.

entry.title: Re: FC push to DM Path for public API
entry.content:
Resolved. This is the address.  
Other issue was causing the problem.

entry.title: Re: Manage Mass Maintenance for custom fields in product...
entry.content:
Hi CeciliaK

It is possible to mass update the custom fields using this app.

Firstly you have to export your data using the App "Export Master Data - Products"

Here you can search for “YY1” and the app will suggest the custom fields that can be exported. After exporting the data, you can change it directly in the Excel file and upload it at the end via the “Start Mass Maintenance - Products” app.

 

With kind regards

entry.title: Conditionally Prevent Message Logs at iFlow Level
entry.content:
Hi, I'm looking to prevent creation of message processing logs (MPL) in certain scenarios in my iFlow.

We are periodically polling from an SFTP server to pick up a file and process it, however, if no file is picked up, we don't want to create an MPL. This hinders monitoring by adding redundant logs.

We initially had the timer-SFTP hybrid which solved this problem, but causes problems if the SFTP server goes down (the integration flow fails entirely and needs to manually be brought back up). It also doesn't trigger the exception sub process if it fails to connect.

Ideally, we want to either not return a log at all, but setting the status of the log would at least make it easier to identify when a file has been picked up (we currently use elevate when there is an error).

I've read some useful blogs, however these only allow for changing MPL by setting a header before the process starts which isn't possible given the timer.

Anyone got any ideas for workarounds or solutions?

entry.title: Re: Counter based PM plans
entry.content: I don't understand how to start the cycle in IP10, and I want them to generate based off the run hours and ignore the calendar date.

entry.title: Re: Calculate Weekdays excluding and Public Holidays in SAP BO WEB Intelligence
entry.content:
Good Job11 Apricate!! for sharing the information

 i found its the day number in a week 1=sun,2=mon,3=tue,4=wed,5=thu,...

entry.title: Re: List of users authorized for reports in SAC

entry.title: FM to obtain the SAP user's field value authorization (BUKRS and EKORG & WERKS).
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

is there any FM/BAPI to obtain the SAP user's field value authorization (Example :BUKRS and EKORG & WERKS).

 

Thanks,

Srinivasa Raju.

entry.title: Pipelines for SAP Integration Suite made easy
entry.content:
I saw the first post on the Pipelines in March 2024.  

Initially, I thought it was just a workaround for not being able to generate iFlows based on the ICOs as we do in our tool. I did have many conversations with the SAP team around the pipeline, customers and partners. I did get to see that the solution did indeed solve some of the problems customers were facing.

Last week I hosted a LinkedIn Live where I showed my take on running pipelines what it is and how to work with them.

I created a simple package for getting started that shared how you can create your first iFlow and run a pipeline.

Migration to it

The first demo example was created by using some iFlows migrated by Figaf and then modified to support Process Direct. It was not ideal iFlows and not something that could scale. And required manual work.

We therefore set out to build a way to for customers to migrate into a fully functioning version of the pipeline including XSLT in partner directory.

It was not a small task and required quite a bit of resources and building on top of our existing solution. I would way that the resulting migration is quite good. And we need both to create an UI (incl versioning for Partner Directory) and change the creation of all the artifacts needed.

The migration process is just as smooth as for all other migrations with the Figaf tool. However, it requires a bit more work to ensure it works because it requires more objects.

Note: For each ICO you need to specify a prefix for all the objects. If you use Interface numbers this will be a good place to add them. This will make it a bit easier to monitor all the messages.

You will need to enter your Sender name and the Interface name that should be used in the partner process.

For the Inbound Interface you should of cause consider it it should be generated or if you use the generic ie, IDOC interface.

 

 

 

The Outbound interfaces look like the following

 

You can see the XSLTs created by clicking on the document icon.

If you make changes to the settings you can regenerate names and you often also need to check the migration. Once you are satisfied you just click migrate. And all artifacts are created and deployed if you select it. 

You can see the end-to-end video here.

We have many improvements to the process but please share what you think could be improved.

Partner Directory Management

One of the key components for running the Pipelines is the Partner Directory. It has only APIs and no UI, which limits its usability. There is a Chrome extension that gives you a little overview of your entries, but it does not give any details. We have, therefore, decided to add a full UI for it in the Figaf tool.

You can see all parameters both String but also binary where you can edit most of parameters. We support all other types of objects also. 

For XSLT you can even use our XSLT editor to check if the artifacts works with some of your input messages. It just reduces the effort with a large part.

 

Testing

You should be able to test the integration if you perform the migration. It is now possible to test the messages on pipelines but it is rather complex.  

We currently have a few stories in our backlog that needs to be released in 2406. You will be able to take your SAP PI/PO messages and run them on the pipeline steps. Then you will be able to check if they work as expected. Just like when you migrate normal iFlows and test them with Figaf. You should also be able to migrate the test cases even is you dont use Figaf for the migration.

Roadmap 

We are not done working with the pipelines concept works better and where we can see Figaf can add value.

  • Transport of Partner Directory content. That way you can approve the changes and use our virtual environments where you reuse the dev tenant also for QA/test.

  • Testing as started above

We are looking for user feedback on how to improve the migration process. 

Try it out

You can explore Figaf's way of running migrations from our Free Migration Edition you can find in SAP store or on our website on migration edition. With the Partner Directory UI it becomes easier for you to operate it.

entry.title: Re: EWM Goods issue not yet carried out SMQ2
entry.content:
Hello, 
This Queue happen because you probably posted goods issue outbound delivery and reversed it. 
Once information about goods issue was sen to S4 and back - system show that queue in 2nd try of GI.
You can try to save this Queue in SMQ2 and proceed next Queue which is waiting for be send to S4.  After execution you will see status of Outbound delivery will be updated in S4.

Best regards Kamil

entry.title: Re: Cannot delete unwanted database connections
entry.content:
Hello,

You are using the Embedded Report Designer in Visual Studio, it's known as CR Basic.

The option you are pointing to is to remove the connection from the report itself, it's not to remove it from the quick list.

CR Basic is not fully functional as the desktop full version which does allow you to delete connections in the quick list:

Don

entry.title: VS Code SAP Fiori Tools Extension Pack - Performance
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

our code base (https://github.tools.sap/fps/servicestoolchain) contains more than 150 Fiori Elements Apps. We have several problems using the Extension pack sapse.sap-ux-fiori-tools-extension-pack.

  • SAP Fiori Tools - Guided Development (SAPSE.sap-ux-help-extension),
  • Application Modeler (SAPSE.sap-ux-application-modeler-extension),
  • Service Modeler (SAPSE.sap-ux-service-modeler-extension):
    • Fiori Tools project selection dialog only shows 2 apps (out of 153) in the selection input field
  • Service Modeler (SAPSE.sap-ux-service-modeler-extension):
    • Overall Performance of Service Modeler is very juddery while navigation is happening
  • SAP Fiori Tools - Guided Development (SAPSE.sap-ux-help-extension):
    • UI loads content very slowly, it takes 20-30 seconds to load data

Please investigate why the performance is bad and especially why the Fiori Tools project selection dialog doesn't list all of our Fiori Apps.

Thanks in advance
Jan

entry.title: Isn't it possible to use "SELECT SINGLE *" for INTO DATA <STRUCTURE>?
entry.content:
Hi Masters,

Doesn't *(asterisk) mean pull all columns?
If we write "SELECT SINGLE *", aren't we saying select a single line (structure)?

If I use "SELECT SINGLE ", can I return only one value, not a row(structure) ?
If I use "SELECT SINGLE *", won't it return a row?



Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to get XML data for local preview of print forms without output history
entry.content:
Thanks!
Not only interesting, but extremely useful!

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content: I added a comment.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: "maximum report processing job limit"
entry.content:
Thanks for the info.

What SP are you using? Go to Programs and features and look for CR for VS, last column should be the version you have installed.

OK so if it works on your DEV PC and not on Production Server you are missing a dependency likely on the Prod Server.

It could be the OS, note CR follow Microsoft's end of life and 2012 is no longer supported:

SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Supported Platforms

CR for VS will have dependencies on newer OS's so possibly the framework needs updating or VS 2013 and VS 2015 C++ runtime is missing. but if that were the case it wouldn't work at all....

How are distributing the CR runtime? CR doesn't support manually copying the files, YOU MUST run the MSI packages on the Server. Too many COM and Registry entries required to attempt to manually distribute.

Use a tool to compare your dev PC to Prod and see if it finds what is missing, could be permissions maybe...

Don

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content:
Hi Andre, just found your comment.

Yes, I am using an Unmanaged implementation. We do not want to use Draft as per business requirements.

So far, I have created a custom buffer where I log once every header entity that is created and update it if a child is also created. Finally, I validate the buffer content on the check_before_save and delete the entry from the buffer. So far, it is working. Yet, wanted to know whether there is a nicer approach that could be taken?

Regards.

Alejandro.

entry.title: What is the System view to get the list of Dataflows created in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi 

I would like to know the System View/Table where all the Dataflows are being stored in Datasphere? 

Thanks
Rufus Samuel

entry.title: Calculating Working days between 2 dates SAP SAC
entry.content:
Dears,

How we can calculate total working days between 2 dates

Below is example:

 

Order#StartEndTotal daysTotal Working daysTotal Working days
Order00107-04-2418-04-24126Holiday:
--9 Apr 2024
--10 Apr 2024
--11 Apr 2024
Weekend:
--12 and 13 Apr 2024
Order00205-05-2411-05-2475Weekend:
--10 and 11 May 2024
Order00319-05-2423-05-2455

entry.title: Re: Feature Request: Allow descriptions for global Proces...
entry.content:
@anna_henkemany thanks for your detailed feedback, which I have already forwarded it to our product experts. In general, you can find all product updates on the following page and you are also able to register for our SAP User Research panel to provide product feedback: 

  • SAP Signavio Product Releases Overview
    You can find all the information on current and upcoming releases on the Product Release page, including:
    • Product updates
    • Step-by-step tutorials for new product features
    • Product roadmap previews

  • Join our new SAP User Research Panel
    It will connect you directly to the people who create the SAP Signavio products. All your feedback will help influence existing and future products and you can see new features exclusively before they are released. Learn how you can participate in the SAP User Research Panel and register your interest.

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content: I don't understand why one wants to implement a buffer if you get this for free by using draft.

entry.title: Re: RAP: How to access child information while being on p...
entry.content: The nicer approach is to use draft since it is part of the standard. '

entry.title: Since H1 2024, is anyone else having issues searching for observers for tasks?
entry.content:
Before the H1 2024 went live in Production, when searching for an observer, we were about to search using first and surname, this would then bring up all possible employees and their infromation.

However, since the upgrade, when we start to type the surname of the employee we need (e.g. John S) the list of employees disappears and there is no way to select the person you need.

Is anyone else seeing this issue?

SAP support have suggested it due to us not having Global Display Name enabled in our instance, however when I search SAP / Google for this, nothing comes up so I have no idea what they are referring to. Also, before the upgrade, this wasn't an issue, it worked as expected, so something has changed which hasn't been highlighted within the information supplied.

Would appreciate anyone's insight into this.

Thanks

entry.title: Unlock the Power of SAP BTP with Skybuffer AI: Streamlining Adoption and Boosting Innovation
entry.content:
Introduction

Discover the power of SAP's Business Technology Platform—an integrated solution designed to revolutionize business automation. From streamlined application development to cutting-edge AI innovations and robust data analytics, SAP offers a comprehensive suite of tools to propel your business forward. Explore how this platform can transform your operations and drive growth.

Challenge

Despite SAP BTP's robust user experience for managing platform services and technical aspects, the true success of business automation hinges on active participation from the company's business staff. While SAP is making strides in providing no-code and low-code interfaces for interacting with BTP services, the full potential of AI automation relies on a comprehensive suite of applications. These applications must enable AI model design, seamless integration with backend systems and communication channels, as well as effective content management—all accessible through intuitive, no-code interfaces.

Solution

Introducing Skybuffer AI, an SAP Build Partner-developed application within the SAP Business Technology Platform. Skybuffer AI seamlessly integrates key SAP AI services and innovations, empowering users to effortlessly design, configure, deploy, train, and connect AI models to backend systems and communication channels through intuitive UI5 applications.

Having successfully completed the pilot phase, Skybuffer AI is now being utilized as a B2E and B2C AI automation solution by numerous global companies, leveraging their SAP BTP subscriptions to drive productivity and innovation.

Architecture

As we continue our journey that began in 2018 with SAP Conversational AI, we have significantly evolved the Skybuffer AI solution. Now, we deploy it exclusively on SAP BTP services, eliminating the need for external servers and complex management blocks.

Deploying Skybuffer AI on a customer's SAP BTP account is seamless, offering a straightforward process for designing AI models. These models cover a range of scenarios, including Conversational AI, Generative AI, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), providing comprehensive solutions for diverse business needs.

Pic. 1 Skybuffer AI Architecture Diagram

Conclusion

In conclusion, Skybuffer AI on SAP BTP stands as a SAP Partner Build solution that streamlines customer onboarding for SAP BTP services adoption. By involving business employees in the AI model design process through intuitive UI5 applications, Skybuffer AI facilitates seamless integration. This allows for both technical access to ML models hosted on SAP AI Core and control via the SAP AI Launchpad.

In our upcoming posts, we'll delve deeper into the Skybuffer AI launchpad, AI model designer, connectivity, and other UI5 applications. These components collectively enhance the SAP BTP adoption journey, offering users a superior experience with SAP BTP services.

entry.title: Re: What attribute should I use to represent FioriAppID f...
entry.content: Hi @julienmoigno. Thank you for your comment! Your answer is enough helpful for my question. I chose your comment as supportive comment. Sincerely, Koichiro

entry.title: Re: Isn't it possible to use "SELECT SINGLE *" for INTO D...
entry.content:
Probably it depends which version you use.

I tried on SAP_ABA 75I and worked for me.

Of course it was a simple select. If I try to use "SELECT *" with JOIN clause, then I'll get the error below

"The column name or association "MATNR" is ambiguous, which means it occurs in multiple tables."

As long as the result contains unique names, that should work on supported versions.

entry.title: Re: The Field "mandt" in Internal Table is in wrong place in the primary key defination
entry.content:
For those searching for the answer: If - in this case MANDT - is not part of the unique/non-unique key components, the error mentioned in the question is being thrown by SAP. To solve this also include the field to the key components.

Example:

TYPES t_huhdr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF /scwm/s_huhdr_int WITH NON-UNIQUE KEY guid_hu. " Error
* TYPES t_huhdr TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF /scwm/s_huhdr_int WITH NON-UNIQUE KEY mandt guid_hu. " No error as MANDT is part of the key

DATA(lt_test) = VALUE t_huhdr( ).
SELECT
FROM @LT_test AS huhdr
JOIN /scwm/huhdr AS huhdr2 ON huhdr2~guid_hu = huhdr~guid_hu
FIELDS huhdr2~*
INTO TABLE @ET_huhdr.

entry.title: Re: Comp mime type 'text/plain;charset=utf-8' instead ''

entry.title: what are the hana cloud services provided by sap till 2017?
entry.content:

SAP HANA Cloud Platform

entry.title: Re: Welcome to Career Corner
entry.content: Thanks Rich, will look into these. Much appreciated.

entry.title: Absence Rate Calculations for Story Reports
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community.

I'm trying to build a story report that can calculate the absence rates for an adjustable time period for each employee within the company, sourcing data from SAP SuccessFactors Time Management.

I have a page filter that uses "day" granularity to set the time frame, however, I can't find a way to calculate the number of sick days each employee as taken within that time frame, only number of days sick leave that start or end within the time frame. 

Are there any tricks I can use to get a story report to calculate how many days sick leave an employee has taken within a given time period? 

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking SAP SuccessFactors People Analytics

entry.title: Re: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content:
Hi,

As it turns out, MS SQL has a function called CEILING.

SELECT CEILING(1.4/0.6)
/* result: 3 */

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello SAP team,

I am a female developer who have been working on SAP ERP projects in Vietnam for a while. I have started off my career as ABAP developer. With the emergence of the ecommerce industry, I have gained the interest in SAP Commerce solution and invested significant effort to analyze and do hands-on development on top of the SAP Commerce on-premises solution. I have decided to pursuit the career of an SAP Commerce Cloud consultant. I am really eager to get certified to grow my career in this domain. Please help to sign me in for this initiative program. I have completed the "Mastering the Technical Essentials of SAP Commerce Cloud" course.

Thanks & Regards,

Giang.

entry.title: Which SAP hana version supports VMware hypervise, as the first technology supported
entry.content:
Which SAP hana version supports VMware hypervise, as the first technology supported to partition a sap hana server into smaller partitions/ VMs

SAP HANA SPS09
SAP HANA SPS05
SAP HANA SPS11
SAP HANA SPS07

entry.title: Re: Isn't it possible to use "SELECT SINGLE *" for INTO D...
entry.content:
Evet dediğiniz şekilde örnekler yaptım ve haklısınız ikinci bir tablo ekleyip belirsiz kolon adları oluşunca kabul etmiyor. Ama yine de anlayamadığım bir nokta şu : Belirsiz sütun ismi ile karşılaştığında ; FROM <tablonun ismi>ni verince FROM'dan sonraki tablonun sütun bilgisini getir demesini beklerdim.

 

Teşekkür ederim.

entry.title: SAP Developer News, May 30th, 2024
entry.content:
ITEMS

Code Connect 2024 is next week and there are live streams available 

  • Code Connect 2024 umbrella website https://code-connect.dev/ 

SAP Integration Suite Spring update and SAP CodeJam roadshow – Latin America

  • What’s new for SAP Integration Suite – Spring 2024: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/what-s-new-for-sap-integration-suite-spring-2024/ba-p/13709235  
  • SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2024 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇨🇱 🇦🇷 🇨🇴 (August 8th - 21st 2024): https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-roadshow-2024-latin-america-edition-august-8th-21st-2024/ba-p/13710015 

5 Steps to Fiori Bootcamp Q2 2024 

  • Blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-for-sap-s-4hana-5-steps-to-fiori-bootcamp-for-customers/ba-p/13510161 
  • Program information document: https://www.sap.com/documents/2021/09/822c893a-fb7d-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=5steps2Fiori  

SAP Version Bot 

  • GitHub repo https://github.com/htammen/saptodon-sap-version-bot 
  • The bot https://saptodon.org/@sap_versions 

DYK: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now available on Docker 

  • Blog post https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/abap-cloud-developer-trial-2022-available-now/ba-p/13598069 
  • Docker Hub image https://hub.docker.com/r/sapse/abap-cloud-developer-trial  

CHAPTER TITLES  

00:00 Intro 
00:07 Code Connect 2024 is next week 
01:50 SAP Integration Suite Spring update and SAP CodeJam roadshow – Latin America 
03:13 5 Steps to Fiori Bootcamp Q2 2024 
04:12 SAP Version Bot  
05:00 DYK: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now available on Docker 

TRANSCRIPT

This is the SAP Developer News for the 30th of May 2024.

[DJ]
There are two great events taking place next week. One, of course, is Sapphire, and the other is an awesome multi-conference event called Code Connect 2024 taking place in Germany. Running Monday through Thursday, there's an SAP CodeJam on service integration with CAP. Then there's reCAP, the conference for all things SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. Then there's UI5con, all things SAPUI5 and OpenUI5. Then there's ABAPConf 2024 Europe, for ABAP developers by ABAP developers. And the best thing, if you can't attend in person, then there are live streams of the sessions and tracks available for each of the reCAP UI5con and ABAPConf conferences. And for the live streams, there's no registration required. If you are lucky enough to be able to attend in person, remember that it's not all develop, develop, develop. Well, mostly it is. As well as the awesome hallway track, there's yoga sessions, massage chairs, an unofficial meetup on a Monday evening in Casa Nostra. I quite like the fact that it's Italian, given the flavor of the CAP documentation. And also don't forget to install the app for the reCAP conference. All the details, including where to catch the live streams are on the individual conference websites, which are all themselves linked from the umbrella code-connect.dev. See you there.

[Antonio]
Hola, SAP developers. Generally, there's a lot happening in the SAP integration suite. Fortunately, Gabriela recently published a blog post in SAP Community where she highlights the different updates that there have been to the different capabilities of SAP Integration Suite. For example, in cloud integration, in API management, in the B2B integration, in edge integration cell. So make sure to check out her blog post to see what has happened lately. Also, in case you missed it, we recently announced the first ever SAP CodeJam Roadshow in Latin America. My colleague, Josh Bentley and I will be doing two topics in this Roadshow, which are Event Driven Integrations with SAP Integration Suite Advanced Event Mesh and SAP Build, Create Apps and Processes without Code. Now, our first stop will be in Sao Paulo, Brazil, the 8th and 9th of August. Then it will be Santiago, Chile, the 12th and 13th of August. Then the 15th and 16th of August will be in Buenos Aires, Argentina. And we will finalize the roadshow in Bogota, Colombia, the 20th and 21st of August. I look forward to meeting you guys over there. See you.

[Ajay]
Hello, everyone. Multiple customers ask us time and again how they can make use of all the features in SAP Fiori and SAP S/4HANA to manage their UX adoption journey. SAP S/4HANA Customer Care and Regional Implementation Group provide a free hands-on experience boot camp called Five Steps to Fiori. This will help you define your UX adoption strategy and gain practical hands-on skills in activities, technologies, and tools to adopt SAP Fiori UX. This boot camp is offered only for SAP customers, and each customer is required to participate as a team. New sessions for Q2 2024 are now listed in the Program Information document. This offering now includes content on SAP S/4HANA Embedded Analytics. The link to the documentation is in the description below.

[DJ]
If you're a developer in the SAP ecosphere and are looking for a reason to jump into the exciting and open world of the Fediverse, There's a great reason in the form of the SAP version bot that toots, that's tweets in old money, timely new release information on SAP related NPM packages and GitHub repositories that it monitors for us. I follow the SAP version bot from my Mastodon account and it helps me keep up to date with what's new in the CAP Node.js and UI5 worlds. Grab yourself an account over in the Fediverse and start following this bot.

[Mamikee]
Did you know the ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 is now available as a Docker image? We know many of you have been waiting for a local ABAP instance that fully supports ABAP's RESTful application programming model. So, to pull this image, simply copy the Docker pull command to the command line. The pull operation will take some time, but eventually it will succeed, and the image will be viewable in the Docker desktop's image tab. Next it's time to get the Docker container. Use the following commands provided on the Docker site and watch the output carefully. You should now be able to click on the A4H and the logs tab should show the same information. Next we're going to set up the SAPGUI connection and log into developers. The SAP system is now up and running and as you can see it's visible in Eclipse. For a deeper dive into specifics including the features and the release highways, check out Julie Plummer's blog post. This post also provides links to further information on ABAP cloud and its accessibility. Be sure to secure your ABAP cloud developer trial now.

entry.title: SAP DM - Order POD only show work when available at workcenter selected
entry.content:
Hello, we have a requirement for process orders when users go into their POD and select a workcenter it only shows when the SFC is available to be worked on at that workcenter. Currently the Order POD show any order that touches that workcenter regardless of being available / ready to be worked on.

As an example, a recipe has two operations, Op 1000 at Workcenter A & Op 9000 at Workcenter B. An order is currently active at Op 1000. Desired state is when a user goes to the POD and searches for Workcenter B, this order does not show as Op 1000 has not been completed.

Does anyone else have a similar requirement and/or solution they have found in the order pod?

entry.title: Re: Exposing On-Premise S/4 Apps to SAP Build Work Zone: A Step-by-Step Guide
entry.content:
@mpredolim I do not see a reason, why this should not work. Prerequisite is of course, that you have made the transaction already made available in the on-premise Fiori Launchpad and business role / space / business catalog. 

Works also for Z-transactions, yes.

entry.title: Re: Non Valuated Grouped Stock in Project Manufacturing Management and Optimization
entry.content:
Hi Anup, I am not aware of any solution that is close to PMMO for the process industry. (Apologies for a late reply).

Best Regards, Kanda

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content: Dear Vera, we are past that long synchronization. I will clear the browser cache and retry. I will report back then. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Block Planning Implementation in PPDS
entry.content:
Hi Emir, 

1) Add Table /SAPAPO/MATKEY in Transaction O1CL

and maintain the organization area:

2) Create the Class with Classtype 300 and Organization Area P

 

Add org.area also to the characteristics:

3) Create & Activate the Integration model in CFM1 & CFM2

Result: Class with Type 400 was created and can be used in /SAPAPO/RES01

 

Cheers, 

Hannes

Tested in S/4HANA 2023 FPS00

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Production Planning FIORI PIR information
entry.content: Hi !! Did you solved this topic ? I am facing the same issue and I don't understand the "B" - I checked my MRP parameters and they seems to be ok - Please let me know

entry.title: Re: Adding last Login details In standard Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
Hello Aashima,

You must follow the steps described at the help page: https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw74/7.4.16/en-us/1d/242486a1874163a4e5ecd64b097157/content.htm?no_cache=true

Do this for ICF-service /sap/bc/ui2/flp and the Last Logon Attempt will be shown after sign-in

entry.title: Re: Excel formula to SQL formula for query
entry.content:
Hi

you can try this

SELECT 
 [OITM].[PurPackUn]
,[OITW].[Maxstock]
,[OITW].[OnHand]
,[OITW].[IsCommited]
,[OITW].[OnOrder]
,[OITM].[PurPackUn]*CEILING(([OITW].[Maxstock]-[OITW].[OnHand]-[OITW].[IsCommited]+[OITW].[OnOrder])/[OITM].[PurPackUn]) AS [OrderQty]
FROM 
OITM
INNER JOIN OITW ON OITW.ItemCode= OITM.ItemCode AND OITW.WhsCode = 'xx'
WHERE
OITM.ItemCode = 'xx'

regards Lothar

entry.title: Hi All
entry.content: Looking for Link to Download Sap Document for knowledge, Request to share a link if we have any.

entry.title: Re: Customer with multiple distribution channels
entry.content: So Constultant wants customer with channels 02, 07 or 10 for customer who don't handle both 03 and 10. Try to add some subquery.
